plugins.name: wiki-markdown
plugins.description: Markdown-backed AI-native wiki — filesystem-primary decision graph. Captures intents/decisions/rejections/trial-error/observations, task bridge nodes, and manages SSOT/runbook with deterministic CLI, 3-stage recall, and integrity checks.

plugins.name: task-github
plugins.description: GitHub 기반 자율 작업 프로토콜 — Issue 추적·Plan Mode·PR 검증을 wiki-markdown task 노드로 결정 그래프와 연계. 프로파일·기어·플로우 3축 분류, 10개 스킬, PR 검증 서브에이전트.
